title: Overworld Revived
description: A "vanilla-like" biome mod! Currently features Redwood Forests, Iris Fields, Maple Forests, and will feature biomes like Hot Springs, and more!
body:
Current Features:

- Redwood Forest Biome:

  - Explore majestic groves of towering redwood trees, a stunning natural addition to any world. The redwood trees are enormous, with thick trunks and dense canopies, creating a rich and immersive forest environment. Use the unique Redwood building blocks to construct massive structures or add a touch of natural beauty to your builds.

- Iris Fields:

  - Wander through expansive fields dotted with vibrant blue and purple irises. These irises are not only beautiful but also add a unique aesthetic to your landscape. The fields are shaped similarly to planes, offering a broad, open space filled with these colorful flowers. Each iris flower brings a splash of color, making these fields a picturesque and serene biome to explore.

- Maple Forest:

  - The Maple Forest biome, featuring trees with striking red foliage.
Immersive environments. It seamlessly integrates with the vanilla game. Whether you're constructing grand structures, embarking on adventures, or simply enjoying the beauty of new landscapes, this mod has something to offer for every type of player. Dive into a world of giant redwoods, colorful iris fields, the vibrant maple forests!

Planned Features:
